title: official.tokyo.jp procedures dataset
description: Structured procedures for foreign residents in Tokyo. Design principles: (1) signpost, not source of truth — every procedure carries official_links to the authoritative lg.jp/go.jp page, and the disclaimer applies to every record; (2) trust is explicit — last_verified is required on every procedure and every official link; (3) token economy — flat structure, short strings, no HTML.

disclaimer.description: Must state that this is not a government dataset and that official pages take precedence.

id.description: Stable slug. Never reuse or rename; agents cache these.

title_local.description: Japanese name as it appears on official documents, e.g. 転入届.

summary.description: One or two plain-English sentences. Aim for under 200 characters.

who.description: Who this applies to, e.g. 'Everyone moving into a Tokyo ward'.

where.description: Where the procedure happens, e.g. 'Your ward office (区役所)'.

cost.description: Plain-language cost, e.g. 'Free', '30% of medical costs at the counter'.

steps.description: 3–5 steps, matching the site's editorial rule.

official_links.description: Authoritative government pages (lg.jp / go.jp). Populated ONLY from the human-verified link database — never add a link that has not been opened and checked.

glossary_terms.description: Japanese terms from /api/glossary.json that appear in this procedure.

languages.description: Languages the guide page is available in.

status.description: coming_soon entries exist so agents know the topic is tracked but not yet human-verified.

last_verified.description: Date a human last opened and checked every link in this record.

guide_url_md.description: Plain-Markdown mirror of guide_url — cheaper for agents to fetch.

label.description: Human-readable, e.g. 'Within 14 days of moving in'.

days.description: Machine-readable number of days, if applicable.

after_event.description: The event the deadline counts from.

when.description: Timing label, e.g. 'Before you move', 'Within 14 days'.

detail_url.description: official.tokyo.jp page with the full step guide.

url.description: Must be a government domain (lg.jp, go.jp, metro.tokyo.lg.jp, city.*.tokyo.jp).

lang.description: Language of the target page, e.g. 'en', 'ja'.
